auth.description: Sensitive OpenClaw provider or integration authentication config merged into the runtime config. For local Docker, api_key profiles may also carry a raw apiKey value that is written to Docker env bootstrap output and stripped from the rendered OpenClaw config.

channels.description: Sensitive channel configuration such as bot tokens merged into the runtime config.

hooks.description: Hook configuration and any hook-scoped secret values merged into runtime hooks.

auth.description: Sensitive gateway authentication config merged into gateway.auth.

gog.description: Local Docker helper secrets for gog integration bootstrap. This branch is rendered into separate Docker bootstrap artifacts and must not appear in rendered OpenClaw config.
